message:
Command `export PATH="/nc/apps/bin:$PATH"
python /nc/agent_tools/ipm_linker/ipm_linker.py \
  -f /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/link_IPs.json \
  --project-root /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526 \
  --verbose \
  --continue-on-error \
  2>&1 | tee /tmp/ipm_linker_run2.log` executed with exit code 0.
